returns.liquidationPrice: Price at which position becomes liquidatable

returns.pnl: Positive for profit, negative for loss

returns.liquidatable: True if position can be liquidated

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

batchAccrueFunding(uint256[]).notice: Batch accrue funding for multiple markets

getHealthFactor(uint256).notice: Get health factor for position (1e18 = 100% healthy)

getMaxAdditionalSize(uint256,uint256).notice: Get maximum additional size for position

getProtocolFees(address).notice: Get collected protocol fees for a token

getTotalOpenInterest(uint256).notice: Get total open interest for market
